hero.headline: Turning Moments Into Heirlooms
hero.subheading: Every frame is handcrafted to preserve the people, milestones and memories that matter most.

intro.script: Made by hand, made to be kept.
intro.body: Framed by RK turns your favourite photos, quotes, dates, certificates and memories into personalised frames that feel thoughtful, beautiful and gift-ready.

products.name: Graduation Frame
products.description: A personalised graduation keepsake with photos, dates, colours and school details.

products.name: Vision Board
products.description: A framed visual reminder of goals, faith, prayers and the future you are building.

products.name: Friendship Frame
products.description: A sentimental collage for birthdays, best friends, sisters and special seasons.

products.name: Faith Frame
products.description: Scripture, prayers, affirmations and memories arranged into a beautiful keepsake.

products.name: Memory Frame
products.description: A thoughtful piece for family, memorials, anniversaries and meaningful moments.

products.name: Custom Keepsake
products.description: Tell us the occasion and we will design a one-of-one frame around your story.

testimonials.quote: It was so personal and beautifully made. The perfect graduation gift.
testimonials.name: Customer

testimonials.quote: The details made it feel so thoughtful. I cried when I opened it.
testimonials.name: Customer

testimonials.quote: Such a beautiful way to keep memories instead of leaving them on my phone.
testimonials.name: Customer

faqs.question: How do I order?
faqs.answer: Click Start Your Frame and complete the order form with your photos, theme and details.

faqs.question: Can I choose colours?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can choose frame colour, text colour, theme, stickers and personal details.

faqs.question: How long does it take?
faqs.answer: Turnaround depends on the size and design, but you will receive a timeline after your request.

faqs.question: Can I request something custom?
faqs.answer: Yes. Custom ideas are welcome. Share the story and we will help design the frame.
